# LearnSphere

> E-learning platform (SaaS): creators build and sell courses; learners buy
> per course (no subscription). Public catalog API is free; the creator API
> (API plan) lets creators build their own shop on top of their courses.

All APIs are versioned in the path (/api/public/v1/…, /api/v1/…). Within a
version only additive changes; breaking changes ship as a new version.

## Docs

- [API documentation (English)](/en/api-docs)
- [API-Dokumentation (Deutsch)](/de/api-doku)
- [Agent skill for the API (SKILL.md)](/skills/learnsphere-api/SKILL.md): drop into your coding agent's skills to integrate the API correctly

## APIs

- [Public catalog API](/api/public/v1/courses): free, no key; courses listed in the LearnSphere shop
- Creator API (/api/v1/courses): Bearer key `ls_…`, requires the API plan; all own published courses
- Affiliate API (/api/v1/affiliate/courses?affiliate=true): Bearer key + affiliate program membership; full catalog with 15% commission links

Courses can be multilingual: responses include `language` (base) and
`languages` (all available). Public and affiliate endpoints accept `?lang=`
to get texts in that language; missing translations fall back to the base
language per field.

## AI-generated content marking (EU AI Act Art. 50)

AI-generated content is machine-readably marked: HTML containers carry
`data-ai-generated="true"` (transcripts, self-tests, assistant replies,
read-aloud), generated TTS audio files embed an ID3v2 `TXXX:DigitalSourceType`
frame with the IPTC value `trainedAlgorithmicMedia`, and endpoints delivering
AI output send an `X-AI-Generated: true` header.

## Affiliate program

- [Landing page (German)](/de/partnerprogramm) / [English](/en/affiliate): 15% commission on referred sales, 7-day cookie window, credit withdrawable or usable for course purchases
